ValidationRule.description: If Initial Setup Call Completed date or SaaS Training Call Completed date is blank, Onboarding Path cannot be updated to 'Webinar'.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000001rqxt'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000000qsnN'), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Path__c, 'Webinar'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Onboarding_Path__c), 'Combined'), OR( ISBLANK(Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c), ISBLANK(SaaS_Training_Call_Completed__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot change the path to Webinar if Initial Setup Call Completed or SaaS Training Call Completed are blank.
